summary_text: ### 修正対象 [script/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L20), [script/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L327), [script/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L392) 前提: - `sovereignty` は既存 state に明示定義が見当たらないため、`runState.sovereignty` を優先し、なければ `runState.requirementsPacket?.classification?.sovereignty ?? null` を記録します。 - `phase_count` は `~/.claude/state/phase-evidence.jsonl` 内の同一 `runId` 件数として算出します。 ### 修正内容（diff形式） 今回のタスクに関係する差分のみを抜粋します。ファイルには既存の未コミット変更もあるため、それらは含めていません。 ```diff --- a/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ const PHASE_EVIDENCE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); +const TASK_COMPLETION_JOURNAL = path.join(STATE_DIR, "task-completion-journal.jsonl"); @@ function writeCompletionEnvelope(runState) { const summary = finalSummary(runState); writeJson(projectOsArtifactPath(runState), { @@ lanes_used: lanesUsed(runState), }); } + +function phaseCount(runState) { + try { + if (!existsSync(PHASE_EVIDENCE)) return 0; + return readFileSync(PHASE_EVIDENCE, "utf8") + .split("\n") + .filter(Boolean) + .map((line) => { + try { + return JSON.parse(line); + } catch { + return null; + } + }) + .filter((entry) => entry?.runId === runState.runId).length; + } catch { + return 0; + } +} + +function writeTaskCompletionArtifacts(runState) { + const completedAt = new Date().toISOString(); + const createdAtMs = Date.parse(runState.createdAt || completedAt); + const summary = finalSummary(runState).slice(0, 500); + const record = { + record_id: randomUUID(), + completed_at: completedAt, + run_id: runState.runId, + task: String(runState.task || "").slice(0, 200), + tier: runState.tier, + sovereignty: runState.sovereignty ?? runState.requirementsPacket?.classification?.sovereignty ?? null, + project: runState.project, + lanes_used: lanesUsed(runState), + review_score: runState.reviewResult?.score ?? null, + phase_count: phaseCount(runState), + total_duration_ms: Number.isFinite(createdAtMs) ? Math.max(0, Date.now() - createdAtMs) : 0, + summary, + summary_sha256: createHash("sha256").update(summary).digest("hex"), + }; + appendJsonl(TASK_COMPLETION_JOURNAL, record); + const markdown = [ + `# Completion Summary`, + ``, + `- record_id: ${record.record_id}`, + `- completed_at: ${record.completed_at}`, + `- run_id: ${record.run_id}`, + `- task: ${record.task}`, + `- tier: ${record.tier}`, + `- sovereignty: ${record.sovereignty ?? "null"}`, + `- project: ${record.project}`, + `- lanes_used: ${record.lanes_used.join(", ") || "(none)"}`, + `- review_score: ${record.review_score ?? "null"}`, + `- phase_count: ${record.phase_count}`, + `- total_duration_ms: ${record.total_duration_ms}`, + `- summary_sha256: ${record.summary_sha256}`, + ``, + `## Summary`, + ``, + record.summary || "(empty)", + ``, + ].join("\n"); + const summaryPath = path.join(RUN_DIR, runState.runId, "completion-summary.md"); + ensureDir(path.dirname(summaryPath)); + writeFileSync(summaryPath, markdown, "utf8"); +} @@ if (next.project && patch.phase && patch.phase !== previousPhase) { writeProjectOsTicket(next); - if (next.phase === "done") writeCompletionEnvelope(next); + if (next.phase === "done") { + writeCompletionEnvelope(next); + writeTaskCompletionArtifacts(next); + } } ``` ### 検証結果 `node --check scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` は成功しました。 未実施: - 実ランでの `~/.claude/state/task-completion-journal.jsonl` 追記確認 - 実ランでの `~/.claude/state/runs/<run-id>/completion-summary.md` 生成確認 理由: - 今回は最小変更に限定し、危険な実行や状態書き込みを伴う実ランは行っていません。
